_comment: Source of truth for Hyperlane agent chain config. Validators + relayers mount this read-only. Copy to agent-config.json and fill in your bridge's chains + addresses. Both source and destination chains must be listed — the validator agent watches origins, the relayer agent submits to destinations.

chain-a._comment: Replace `chain-a` with your origin chain key (lowercase, no spaces). The same key is used in validator/relayer .env and docker-compose profiles.
chain-a.name: chain-a

index._comment: from: block at/just-before the mailbox deploy. chunk: eth_getLogs window — drop to 100 if your RPC truncates large windows.

transactionOverrides._comment: Set ONLY if the chain has a legacy/flat-fee gas model that the agent's EIP-1559 default rejects. String to survive u64 limits (e.g. some L1s pin gas at 1e19+). Delete this block on standard EIP-1559 chains.
